sections.paragraph:
m. suff. שַׁמְנִי, plur. שְׁמָנִים-

(1) fat, fatness, Psa 109:24. מִשְׁתֵּה שׁמָנִים a feast of fat things, Isa 25:6 10:27 , וְחֻבַּל עֹל מִפְּנֵי שֶׁמֶן “and the yoke (of Israel) is broken because of fatness,” a metaphor taken from a fat bull that casts off and breaks the yoke (compare Deu 32:15 Hos 4:16); also fruitfulness of the earth. גֵּיא שְׁמָנִים a very fertile valley, Isa 28:1.

(2) oil, Gen 28:18. עֵץ שֶׁמֶן an oleaster (differing from זַיִת an olive tree), Neh 8:15 1Ki 6:23.

(3) spiced oil, i.e. ointment, Psa 133:2 Pro 21:17 Isa 1:6.
